title: Q2 – Airport Delay Ranking
description: Top-10 aeroporti per ritardi significativi in partenza (DEP_DELAY > 30min) – finestre 1h, 6h e global (event time)

panels.title: Finestra 1h – Top-10 aeroporti per severe_delays (ultima emissione)
panels.description: Numero di voli con ritardo >30 min per aeroporto. Ogni barra è un aeroporto (ID numerico BTS), ordinato per rank crescente.

targets.query:
lastTs = from(bucket: "flights")
  |> range(start: 2025-01-01T00:00:00Z, stop: 2025-04-30T23:59:59Z)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "q2_ranking_1h")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "severe_delays")
  |> group()
  |> sort(columns: ["_time"], desc: true)
  |> limit(n: 1)
  |> findRecord(fn: (key) => true, idx: 0)

from(bucket: "flights")
  |> range(start: lastTs._time, stop: time(v: int(v: lastTs._time) + 60000))
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "q2_ranking_1h")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "severe_delays")
  |> group(columns: ["rank", "origin_airport_id"])
  |> first()
  |> group()
  |> sort(columns: ["rank"])
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({r with _field: (if int(v: r.rank) < 10 then "0" + r.rank else r.rank) + ". airport " + r.origin_airport_id}))
  |> group(columns: ["_field"])

panels.title: Finestra 6h – Top-10 aeroporti per severe_delays (ultima emissione)
panels.description: Ranking su finestra scorrevole da 6 ore, slide 60 min. Mostra l'ultima classifica emessa da Flink.

targets.query:
lastTs = from(bucket: "flights")
  |> range(start: 2025-01-01T00:00:00Z, stop: 2025-04-30T23:59:59Z)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "q2_ranking_6h")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "severe_delays")
  |> group()
  |> sort(columns: ["_time"], desc: true)
  |> limit(n: 1)
  |> findRecord(fn: (key) => true, idx: 0)

from(bucket: "flights")
  |> range(start: lastTs._time, stop: time(v: int(v: lastTs._time) + 60000))
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "q2_ranking_6h")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "severe_delays")
  |> group(columns: ["rank", "origin_airport_id"])
  |> first()
  |> group()
  |> sort(columns: ["rank"])
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({r with _field: (if int(v: r.rank) < 10 then "0" + r.rank else r.rank) + ". airport " + r.origin_airport_id}))
  |> group(columns: ["_field"])

panels.title: Classifica cumulativa – Finestra Global (trigger ogni 60 min di event time)
panels.description: Top-10 aeroporti dall'inizio del dataset (2025-01-01). Ultima emissione dal trigger globale, ordinata per rank.

targets.query:
from(bucket: "flights")
  |> range(start: 2025-01-01T00:00:00Z, stop: 2025-04-30T23:59:59Z)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "q2_ranking_global")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "severe_delays")
  |> group(columns: ["origin_airport_id", "rank"])
  |> last()
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({ r with _field: r.rank + "|" + r.origin_airport_id }))
  |> group(columns: ["_field"])

from(bucket: "flights")
  |> range(start: 2025-01-01T00:00:00Z, stop: 2025-04-30T23:59:59Z)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "q2_ranking_global")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "num_flights")
  |> group(columns: ["origin_airport_id", "rank"])
  |> last()
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({ r with _field: r.rank + "|" + r.origin_airport_id }))
  |> group(columns: ["_field"])

from(bucket: "flights")
  |> range(start: 2025-01-01T00:00:00Z, stop: 2025-04-30T23:59:59Z)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "q2_ranking_global")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "dep_delay_mean")
  |> group(columns: ["origin_airport_id", "rank"])
  |> last()
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({ r with _field: r.rank + "|" + r.origin_airport_id }))
  |> group(columns: ["_field"])

from(bucket: "flights")
  |> range(start: 2025-01-01T00:00:00Z, stop: 2025-04-30T23:59:59Z)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "q2_ranking_global")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "dep_delay_max")
  |> group(columns: ["origin_airport_id", "rank"])
  |> last()
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({ r with _field: r.rank + "|" + r.origin_airport_id }))
  |> group(columns: ["_field"])

panels.title: Global – Evoluzione ranking cumulativo (severe_delays, tutti i rank)
panels.description: Ogni serie è un aeroporto che compare nel top-10 globale nel corso del tempo. Permette di vedere come la classifica si consolida man mano che arrivano i dati.

targets.query:
lastTs = from(bucket: "flights")
  |> range(start: 2025-01-01T00:00:00Z, stop: 2025-04-30T23:59:59Z)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "q2_ranking_global")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "severe_delays")
  |> group()
  |> sort(columns: ["_time"], desc: true)
  |> limit(n: 1)
  |> findRecord(fn: (key) => true, idx: 0)

from(bucket: "flights")
  |> range(start: lastTs._time, stop: time(v: int(v: lastTs._time) + 60000))
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "q2_ranking_global")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "severe_delays")
  |> group(columns: ["rank", "origin_airport_id"])
  |> first()
  |> group()
  |> sort(columns: ["rank"])
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({r with _field: (if int(v: r.rank) < 10 then "0" + r.rank else r.rank) + ". airport " + r.origin_airport_id}))
  |> group(columns: ["_field"])
